_comment: Shared capability-negotiation vectors. IDENTICAL file in the anchored (client) and anchored_oss (server) repos. The server test asserts it produces these responses; the client test asserts it sends these requests and parses these responses. Hosts are generic.

vectors.name: capability_less_no_policy
vectors.description: A request without client_capabilities gets a response with no policy field (byte-identical to the pre-negotiation protocol).

vectors.name: capability_aware_policy_present
vectors.description: A request advertising client_capabilities gets policy hints reflecting the org's effective policy (defaults shown).

vectors.name: over_cap_wholesale_reject
vectors.description: When pushes exceed max_memories_per_sync, every result is rejected with rule max_memories_per_sync and nothing is persisted. (count is illustrative; tests use the org's configured cap + 1.)
